rule.cleanup: Delete invalid ST unless LUWU old migration batch nomor_ulok starts with 2VZ1-2603.
rule.keep_exception: Keep LUWU 2VZ1-2603 because business asked migrated ST date to be taken from opname final.
rule.invalid_definition: ST exists but latest normal readiness fails: no opname_final, no opname item, no completed supervision, or completed supervision still missing opname.
